name: kern
description: Kern language — manifest features: game (Raylib, default), native-ide (Qt6 for kern-ide). IDE-only builds use VCPKG_MANIFEST_NO_DEFAULT_FEATURES plus VCPKG_MANIFEST_FEATURES=native-ide.

native-ide.description: Qt6 (Widgets) for kern/ide/qt-native (kern-ide). default-features false avoids OpenSSL/ICU/SQL stack from full qtbase defaults.
